dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses daily pivot support level (s1) role reversal pattern. Entry: previous close above s1 (support broken on downside), then price retraces upward. Exit: when price crosses back above the now-reversed resistance level (s1). The pattern expects limited upside retracements capped by the former support-turned-resistance.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses daily pivot support level (s1) role reversal pattern. Entry: previous close above s1 (support broken on downside), then price retraces upward. Exit: when price crosses back above the now-reversed resistance level (s1). The pattern expects limited upside retracements capped by the former support-turned-resistance.

source_rule_text: Once a daily pivot support level is broken on the downside, it reverses its role and becomes resistance; subsequent upward retracements may get capped by this reversed resistance level.
